arts.ttl: Brest vs Real Madrid, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Brest in the last game of the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League Group Stage. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti fires Vinicius Junior warning to Saudi Pro League
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti laughs off the idea of Real Madrid losing Vinicius Junior to a world record bid from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr’s luxury gift to Real Madrid teammates and one special guest
arts.sum: Real Madrid fans are watching on with a mix of hope and uncertainty as they ponder the future of their standout player in recent years: Vinicius Júnior. As AS has learned, the Brazilian invited his Real Madrid teammates to a dinner in his home in La Moraleja, a luxury residential area in the north of the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Di Marzio claims Newcastle man could soon join Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are being tipped as surprise transfer suitors for in-form Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali. The Italy international has bounced back superbly for Newcastle after missing a lot of games due to a betting ban, and Eddie Howe will be delighted with the impact he’s made.
